mapper.select: SELECT A.USER_ID AS id , A.USER_NM AS userNm , A.EML AS eml , A.MTELNO AS mtelno , A.GNDR_SE AS gndrSe , A.TELNO AS telno , A.ADDR AS addr , A.DADDR AS daddr , A.CI AS ci , A.DI AS di , 'A' AS userSe , B.SITE_CD AS siteCd , B.AUTH_CD AS authCd , B.AUTH_EXP_YMD AS authExpYmd , B.AUTH_SE AS authSe FROM CMS_USER_ADMIN A LEFT JOIN CMS_USER_AUTH B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND B.USER_SE = 'A' WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY B.AUTH_CD

SELECT A.USER_ID AS id , A.USER_NM AS userNm , A.EML AS eml , A.MTELNO AS mtelno , A.GNDR_SE AS gndrSe , A.TELNO AS telno , A.ADDR AS addr , A.DADDR AS daddr , A.CI AS ci , A.DI AS di , 'E' AS userSe , B.SITE_CD AS siteCd , B.AUTH_CD AS authCd , B.AUTH_EXP_YMD AS authExpYmd , B.AUTH_SE AS authSe FROM CMS_USER_TASK A LEFT JOIN CMS_USER_AUTH B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND B.USER_SE = 'E' WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY B.AUTH_CD

SELECT A.USER_ID AS id , A.USER_NM AS userNm , A.EML AS eml , A.MTELNO AS mtelno , A.GNDR_SE AS gndrSe , A.TELNO AS telno , A.ADDR AS addr , A.DADDR AS daddr , A.CI AS ci , A.DI AS di , 'G' AS userSe , B.SITE_CD AS siteCd , B.AUTH_CD AS authCd , B.AUTH_EXP_YMD AS authExpYmd , B.AUTH_SE AS authSe FROM CMS_USER A LEFT JOIN CMS_USER_AUTH B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND B.USER_SE = 'G' WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY B.AUTH_CD
SELECT TK_ID AS tkId , USER_ID AS userId , TK AS tk , TK_EXP_DT AS tkExpDt , RVK_YN AS rkvYn , IP_ADDR AS ipAddr , USER_AGT AS userAgt FROM CMS_RF_TK WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND RVK_YN = 'N'
